artifacts.name: phi-redactor
artifacts.summary: PHI redactor for clinical notes. Strips SSN, MRN, DOB, NPI, phone, email, dates. Healthcare-tuned.
artifacts.task: PHI redactor for clinical notes — strips SSN, phone, email, dates, MRN, DOB, and Hollywood-reserved phone ranges

artifacts.name: legal-clause-extractor
artifacts.summary: NDA / contract clause extractor. Pulls governing_law, term_months, effective_date.
artifacts.task: legal clause extractor — pulls governing_law, parties, term_months, and effective_date from NDA-style contracts

artifacts.name: invoice-parser
artifacts.summary: Invoice parser. Extracts invoice_number, iso_date, amount, currency from AR/AP text.
artifacts.task: invoice parser — extracts iso_date, invoice_number, amount, currency from billing text

artifacts.name: code-issue-classifier
artifacts.summary: Code review comment classifier. Routes into security / performance / style / test / docs / refactor.
artifacts.task: code review issue classifier — routes review comments into security / performance / style / test / docs / refactor

artifacts.name: multilingual-greeter
artifacts.summary: Language detector for 7 European languages, sized for edge devices (microsecond runtime).
artifacts.task: multilingual greeter — detects english / spanish / french / german / portuguese / italian / dutch in short greetings (edge-tiny: 4 KB recipe, microsecond runtime)
